name: Cabbage Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine, or veggie broth
1/2 teaspoon white pepper, or lemon pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients in a large Dutch oven.
2. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 30 minutes, or until all vegetables are tender.
4. Optionally, add mushrooms, zucchini, or any other preferred vegetables.
